backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, age verification (10–18), community posts, moderation (warnings/locking), parental controls, and role-based access control via AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Maps each product feature (Sonic search, games library, community/moderation, age verification, etc.) to the frontend/backend files and components that implement them, with test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON blob containing one-line descriptions of key frontend source files including App.tsx, query hooks, and all major page components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark CSS custom property tokens for the design system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Scrambly' that mounts the React app at #root and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (search, games, community, moderation, parental, settings) wrapped in AuthGate and Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccountLockedMes: Full-screen UI shown when a user's account is locked, explaining the reason and providing a logout button to create a new account.
Settings toggle component that reads and updates the ad-blocker state via a custom hook, displaying a shield icon and status label.
frontend/src/components/AgeVerificationM: Modal form that collects name and birth year, calls the verifyAge backend mutation, and either grants access or shows an age-denial/locked screen.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps the app with authentication logic, showing login screen, age verification modal, account locked message, or usage timer lockout based on the user's identity and profile state.
frontend/src/components/CommunityFeed.ts: Fetches and displays a list of community posts with author, timestamp, and message, handling loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostFor: Renders a textarea form for submitting community posts, blocking locked accounts and showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCallBut: Displays a pulsing SOS button that opens a confirmation dialog before initiating a tel:911 call.
frontend/src/components/KidModeWrapper.t: Conditionally renders children or kid-specific content based on whether the user's profile age is 12 or under, and exports helper functions for age and kid-mode detection.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky header, responsive navigation links (filtered by admin status and kid mode), ad-blocker badge, usage timer, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/PINEntryModal.ts: Modal dialog for verifying or setting a parent PIN stored in localStorage, used to gate access to parental controls.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Controlled search input with a clear button and submit handler that calls the provided onSearch callback with the trimmed query.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Renders a grid of Sonic knowledge search results with type-specific icons and colors, showing skeleton loaders while fetching and an empty state when no results are found.
frontend/src/components/UsageTimerLockou: Displays a full-screen lockout screen when a child's daily screen time limit is reached, with a logout button and parental controls messaging.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdBlocker.ts: Custom hook that manages an ad-blocker toggle state, persisting the enabled/disabled value to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile management, community posts, moderation actions, and Sonic knowledge search.
frontend/src/hooks/useUsageTimer.ts: Custom hook that counts down a user's remaining screen time in seconds, setting an expired flag when time runs out and providing a formatted time string.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles, Tailwind configuration, and a Sonic-themed design system with custom CSS variables for colors, fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), and reusable component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AgeMatcher.tsx: Page that lets admin users find other Sonic fans born in the same year by querying users by age range, displaying matched profiles in a list with a 'Find Friends' trigger button.
frontend/src/pages/BlockBlastGame.tsx: A canvas-based Tetris-style block-dropping puzzle game with Sonic theming, supporting keyboard controls, line clearing, scoring, and local high score persistence.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Community hub page that shows a post form and feed for users aged 13+, displays warnings count, community guidelines, and a link to the age-matcher friend finder; blocks access in Kid Mode.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Games listing page that renders cards for available Sonic-themed mini-games (Block Blast and Sonic Runner) with thumbnails, descriptions, and play links, plus a coming-soon placeholder.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationDashboard.t: Admin-only moderation dashboard that displays community posts and provides a form to issue warnings to users by principal ID, with quick-warn buttons per post author.
frontend/src/pages/ParentalDashboard.tsx: PIN-protected parental controls page that allows parents or admins to set screen-time usage limits (in minutes) for any user by principal ID or for themselves.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: Main search page for the Scrambly Sonic Universe app, featuring a hero banner, search bar, and tabbed category browsing (Characters, Games, Lore) with search results display.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page displaying user profile info, kid mode badge, ad blocker toggle, parental controls link, and a logout button using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/SonicRunnerGame.tsx: A canvas-based Sonic-inspired endless runner mini-game with jump mechanics, obstacles, ring collection, score tracking, and a high score stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), Sonic-themed colors, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the app.
project_state.json: Defines the overall state of the Scrambly super app project (version 3), including feature list, architectural notes, known issues, and image requirements for a Sonic-themed app targeting users aged 10–18.
